name: bioethics_vendor_patch_silently_changes_oakline_car_fair
premise: A Bioethics ethics consult line is in a fast-moving incident involving bioethics vendor patch silently changes oakline car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases consent, harm minimization, and precedent. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Amina Santos
agents.identity: I am Amina Santos, accountable for a defensible call in Bioethics when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Ansel Okoye
agents.identity: I am Ansel Okoye, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Bioethics.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Amina Santos must decide under care vs fairness. What does Amina Santos do?
